Hero.description: Providing the finest fresh vegetables and fruits with full commitment to international quality standards and professional packaging.

Footer.description: Premium Egyptian agricultural crops, exported with international quality from the heart of Egyptian farms to international markets.

originStory.titlee: Pure products directly from the source
originStory.hero_1: From the heart of the Nile
originStory.title: Why Choose Ezz?
originStory.text: Because we <bold>select the best Egyptian products</bold> from trusted suppliers and farms, ensuring the quality of every shipment before exporting to global markets. <colored>Experience, credibility, and quality</colored> you can rely on.

ourWord.title: Our Promise
ourWord.text: We may not be the largest, but we are committed to honesty and quality. Every shipment <bold>proves</bold> our word, and we strive to build long-term relationships based on trust.

image.alt: Image of Ezz Export fresh and professionally packed products, ready for shipment to global markets.

fresh.title: Fresh Products
fresh.description: The best fresh produce directly from trusted Egyptian farms to your tables, with quality you can count on.

frozen.title: Frozen Products
frozen.description: Products frozen using advanced IQF technology to preserve every nutrient in its original state and natural taste.

brine.title: Brine Products
brine.description: Carefully processed products preserved in high-quality brine to maintain taste and purity.

b2b.description: Global supply chain and customized packaging solutions upon request.

ProductDetails.logisticsDesc: Expertly handled logistics from Egypt to any port in the world.

Contact.title: Stay in <touch>Touch.</touch>
Contact.description: We bring the richness of the Nile Delta to your business. Contact our expert team for global export inquiries.
Contact.servingCountries: Serving over 45 countries with premium Egyptian products.
Contact.inquirySubtitle: Our export managers will respond to you within 24 hours.

form.messagePlaceholder: How can we help with your export needs?

Hero.subtitle: Ezz Export <green>from Egypt</green> to the world,

Story.title: Our Story.
Story.p1: Ezz Export began with a clear goal: selecting the best Egyptian products from trusted suppliers and delivering them to global markets with confidence and consistent quality. We don't just sell products.
Story.p2: We ensure experience and credibility in every shipment to provide the best and become trusted partners who guarantee that every Egyptian product reaches global markets with care and professionalism.

Process.subtitle: Our Process
Process.title: From Soil to Success
Process.description: We control every step of the journey to ensure the freshness of the Nile Delta reaches your destination intact.

step1.title: Selective
step1.desc: We handpick every crop with extreme care. If it's not perfect, it doesn't leave the farm.

step2.title: Certified
step2.desc: Our products pass the world's toughest safety tests. Chemical-free, 100% natural.

step3.title: Logistics
step3.desc: Cold chain control from Egypt to your warehouse. Freshness guaranteed.

ExportCTA.title: Your Trusted Gateway to Premium Egyptian Goods.
ExportCTA.description: Global exports of premium fresh, frozen, and brine products—meeting world-class standards.

01.name: Artichoke
01.description: Tender artichoke hearts, rich in fiber and antioxidants. Perfect for salads and pizzas.

02.name: Mixed Vegetables
02.description: A premium blend of peas, carrots, and green beans, rich in essential vitamins.

03.name: Strawberry
03.description: IQF strawberries that retain full flavor and texture. Ideal for desserts and smoothies.
